Where to Watch

FS1TeleFOX One

Match Officials

Referee:Anthony Taylor

2:30

Moreno believes Colombia still has work to do after a 3-1 victory

Díaz scores as Colombia edge battling Uzbekistan

Second-half goals from Luis Díaz and Jáminton Campaz gave Colombia a 3-1 victory over debutants Uzbekistan.
Jun 18, 2026, 12:38 am - PA

Match Timeline & Momentum
Momentum
This graph shows how much pressure a team applied during the match. Taller columns indicate stronger attacking periods, based on things like possession, shots, goals, big chances, and other key stats.

UZB
COL
KOHTFT

Commentary

Colombia are off and running on their return to the World Cup finals, soaring to the top of Group K following a 3-1 victory over tournament debutants Uzbekistan. Los Cafeteros, who registered an xG of 1.62 to their opponents' 1.16, dominated large periods of the first half. Arias fired narrowly wide and Diaz struck the post before they took the lead in the 40th minute. Diaz clipped a lovely ball into the box, where Munoz swivelled and sent a superb volley flying into the net. Uzbekistan failed to register a single touch in the opposing box during the first half. However, they equalised against the run of play on the hour mark, with Fayzullaev heading into an empty net after Shomurodov's initial volley was blocked. Yet Colombia regained their lead just five minutes later, as Diaz rounded off a swift counter with his shot creeping beyond Yusupov, whose weak palm couldn't keep it out. Lorenzo's side put the contest to bed deep into stoppage time, when Hernandez's wonderful cross was powered home by the head of fellow substitute Campaz. Colombia have momentum going into their second Group K game against DR Congo on June 23, with Uzbekistan requiring drastic improvement before facing Portugal on the same day. That's all for now. Thanks for your company. Until next time, goodbye!

101'

FULL-TIME: UZBEKISTAN 1-3 COLOMBIA

100'

WHAT A HIT! Uzbekistan seek a consolation and Karimov lets fly from distance. It's a thunderous hit, and he's so unlucky to see his shot rattle the crossbar with Vargas beaten.

99'

Hernandez did magnificently to dig out that cross, which was a striker's dream and begging to be attacked.

90'+9'
Goal - Header

3-1!!! GAME OVER! CAMPAZ SEALS IT AT THE DEATH! He owes a great deal of gratitude to Hernandez, though. The latter chases a long ball and does superbly to maintain possession, having initially gone to ground. He manages to whip a delicious ball across the face of goal, where Campaz is on hand to head home. That will surely be that!

Jáminton CampazJ. CampazGoal
Cucho HernándezC. HernándezAssist
97'

Once again, the quality of delivery is severely lacking for the White Wolves, with their free-kick aimlessly floating behind for a goal-kick. Colombia will be in no hurry to restart the game.

Scotland vs. Morocco line-ups: World Cup 2026 predicted XIs

Scotland will be seeking to build on their 1-0 over Haiti -- their first win in a World Cup match since 1990 -- when they take on Morocco at the Boston Stadium but it won't be an easy feat against the AFCON champions.

8m

Neymar won't play for Brazil vs. Haiti in race to be fit for World Cup knockout stages

Neymar will not play or travel with the Brazil team to Philadelphia for their FIFA World Cup Group C match against Haiti, the Brazil federation confirmed on Thursday.

Notice of Right to Opt Out of Sale/Sharing

Some US states provide residents (or their authorized agents) with the right to opt out of “targeted advertising,” “selling,” or “sharing” of personal information, as defined by applicable laws. You can move the toggle to the left and click “Submit” to opt out of such activities occurring through this digital property. If you are logged in, we may be able to associate your choice with your account and apply it to data sharing occurring through this digital property (across your browsers and devices) as well as other digital properties of The Walt Disney Family of Companies. You can confirm the status of your choice or opt out or in by clicking “Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information” or “Your Privacy Choices” on each property.

Manage Consent Preferences

Selling, Sharing, Targeted Advertising

If you are not logged in, your opt-out will be specific to this property and device or browser. For our other digital properties, to opt out, select “Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information” or “Your Privacy Choices” on each. If you clear your tracking history or use another browser or device, you’ll need to opt out again.

You can also submit this opt-out form, which may enable us to apply your opt-out more broadly, for example, to stop data sharing in connection with advertising intended to reach you on platforms not operated by Disney (e.g., social media platforms).

You may enable online, where available, a universal tool that automatically communicates your opt-out, such as Global Privacy Control (“GPC”), which we’ll process as if you had opted out through the toggle.

Even if you opt out, you may continue to see advertising, including ads that may be based on personal information processed before you opted out. Please visit Your US State Privacy Rights for more information about your rights and how to exercise them.
